name: Keylogging - Input Capture via SetWindowsHookEx or GetAsyncKeyState
description: Detects keylogging activity by monitoring for SetWindowsHookEx keyboard hooks, GetAsyncKeyState polling, and known keylogger tools. Covers PowerShell keyloggers, software keyloggers, and credential capture scripts.
query: process where event.type == "start" and (process.args : ("*GetAsyncKeyState*", "*SetWindowsHookEx*", "*Get-Keystrokes*", "*Start-KeyLogger*", "*WH_KEYBOARD*") or (process.name : ("powershell.exe", "pwsh.exe") and process.args : ("*user32.dll*", "*GetAsyncKeyState*")))
